data.content:
Plan complete for scope refinement worker. 7 child knots created in dependency order:

Wave 1 (parallel): e382 (schema extension), 3465 (default prompt), d961 (job queue)
Wave 2 (parallel): 681b (worker + agent dispatch), 47a2 (beat creation hook), 26e7 (settings UI)
Wave 3: 1061 (notification hook + status endpoint)

Key decisions:
- In-memory queue (no external deps) — matches existing terminal/orchestration session patterns
- scope_refinement added as poolable dispatch state in PoolsSettings
- Prompt configurable per-project via Settings > Defaults tab
- Agent selection via Basic (single agent) or Advanced (weighted pool) dispatch modes
- Notification bridged from server to client via polling status endpoint
- Fire-and-forget enqueue in POST /api/beats — does not block creation
